title: Junior Business Development Manager at Colliers India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Colliers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!
